'''shashopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docetism|docetism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docetism|docetism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shashopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæshepeth|shæshepeth]] || [[word:shæshepej|shæshepej]] || [[word:shæshepesh|shæshepesh]] || [[word:shæshepe|shæshepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shashoshopoth|shashoshopoth]] || [[word:shashoshopoj|shashoshopoj]] || [[word:shashoshoposh|shashoshoposh]] || [[word:shashoshopo|shashoshopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shashopoth|shashopoth]] || [[word:shashopoj|shashopoj]] || [[word:shashoposh|shashoposh]] || [[word:shashopo|shashopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shashofpofth|shashofpofth]] || [[word:shashofpofj|shashofpofj]] || [[word:shashofpofsh|shashofpofsh]] || [[word:shashofpof|shashofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shashopotho|shashopotho]] || [[word:shashopojo|shashopojo]] || [[word:shashoposho|shashoposho]] || [[word:shashopoko|shashopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shashopoth|shashopoth]] || [[word:shashopoj|shashopoj]] || [[word:shashoposh|shashoposh]] || [[word:shashopo|shashopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shashopothol|shashopothol]] || [[word:shashopojol|shashopojol]] || [[word:shashoposhol|shashoposhol]] || [[word:shashopokol|shashopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shashopoothotho|shashopoothotho]] || [[word:shashopoojojo|shashopoojojo]] || [[word:shashopooshosho|shashopooshosho]] || [[word:shashopooko|shashopooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shashopothon|shashopothon]] || [[word:shashopojon|shashopojon]] || [[word:shashoposhon|shashoposhon]] || [[word:shashopokon|shashopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shashopothooro|shashopothooro]] || [[word:shashopojooro|shashopojooro]] || [[word:shashoposhooro|shashoposhooro]] || [[word:shashopokooro|shashopokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
